nasb.text: “Now there was a rich man, and he habitually dressed in purple and fine linen, joyously living in splendor every day.

esv.text: “There was a rich man who was clothed in     purple and fine linen and     who feasted sumptuously every day.

cnv.text: “有一個財主，身穿紫色袍和細麻衣，天天奢華宴樂。

ccb.text: 耶稣又说：“有个财主天天衣着华丽，生活奢侈。

csbs.text: “有一个财主，身穿紫色袍子和细麻衣，天天奢华宴乐。
